register.title: Pangani akaunti
register.subtitle: Lowetsani tsatanetsatane wanu kuti muyambe
register.successMessage: Zikomo chifukwa cholembetsa. Kuti muyambitse akaunti yanu, chonde onani imelo yanu ndikudina ulalo wotsimikizira womwe tidakutumizirani.
register.passwordTooShort: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala osachepera 6 zilembo

twoFactor.title: Kutsimikiziridwa kwa Zinthu Ziwiri
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Lowani kachidindo ka manambala 6 kuchokera ku pulogalamu yanu yotsimikizira
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Lowetsani imodzi mwa zizindikiro zanu zobwezeretsa kuti mulowe
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Chonde lowetsani kachidindo kovomerezeka kobwezeretsa (mawonekedwe: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Kukhala ndi mavuto? Lumikizanani ndi thandizo kuti muthandizidwe.

setup.subtitle: Tiyeni tikhazikitse. Chonde sankhani mtundu wa akaunti yanu kuti mupitirize.
setup.clinicDescription: Ndikuimira chipatala chamankhwala kapena malo azaumoyo omwe ali ndi madokotala ambiri
setup.labDescription: Ndikuimira labotale yowunikira kapena malo oyeserera
setup.individualDescription: Ndine dokotala wa zaumoyo payekha kapena wofufuza

messages.errorFallback: Analephera kutumiza imelo yobwezeretsanso. Chonde yesaninso.

success.title: Onani imelo yanu
success.sentTo: Tinatumiza ulalo wobwezeretsanso mawu achinsinsi ku {{email}}
success.description: Chonde onani bokosi lanu lolowera ndikutsatira malangizo kuti mubwezeretse mawu anu achinsinsi. Ulalowu umatha mu ola limodzi.

form.title: Mwaiwala mawu anu achinsinsi?
form.description: Lowani imelo yanu ndipo tidzakutumizirani ulalo wobwezeretsanso.

messages.errorFallback: Analephera kubwezeretsanso mawu achinsinsi. Ulalowu ukhoza kutha.

form.title: Bwezeretsani mawu anu achinsinsi
form.description: Lowetsani mawu anu achinsinsi atsopano pansipa.

messages.invalidLink: Ulalo wotsimikizira wosayenera. Chonde gwiritsani ntchito ulalo kuchokera ku imelo yanu.
messages.errorFallback: Analephera kutsimikizira imelo. Ulalowu ukhoza kutha.

state.loadingDescription: Chonde dikirani pamene tikutsimikizira adilesi yanu ya imelo...
state.errorDescription: Sitinathe kutsimikizira adilesi yanu ya imelo.

success.nextStep: Tsopano mutha kulowa mu akaunti yanu ndi imelo yanu ndi mawu achinsinsi.

error.helpText: Ngati izi zikupitirirabe, funsani thandizo kapena kulembetsanso.
